title: Pistolochia buschii
taxonomy: Pistolochia buschii is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It belongs to the genus Pistolochia which is a small group of plants native to tropical regions. This plant is most closely related to the genus Cupania, with which it shares similarities in leaf and flower morphology. Pistolochia buschii is classified as a shrub or small tree, typically found in humid, subtropical environments. Its classification is based on a combination of botanical and morphological characteristics.
